text.en: Science fiction turned artificial labor into a public anxiety about work, obedience and creator responsibility.
text.zh: 科幻把“人工劳工”变成公共焦虑：机器不只是工具，也会改变劳动、服从与责任。

text.en: Karel Capek's play R.U.R. introduced the word "robot" into modern culture and made artificial workers a dramatic image of industrial anxiety. Its revolt-of-the-made theme gave later AI debates a durable metaphor for labor replacement, obedience, and creator responsibility.
text.zh: 卡雷尔·恰佩克的剧作《罗素姆的万能机器人》把“机器人”一词带入现代文化，也把人工劳工变成工业焦虑的舞台意象。它关于“被制造者反噬制造者”的母题，为后来的 AI 讨论提供了劳工替代、服从边界与造物责任的持久隐喻。
